## Requested Change

Describe the requested outcome.

## Type

- [ ] Visual polish
- [ ] Page redesign
- [ ] Semantic model enhancement

- [ ] Documentation/process improvement

## Business Purpose

Why does this change matter?

## Constraints

List any business, design, or technical constraints.

## Proposed Validation

How should success be checked?

## Notes

Reference any relevant memory or benchmark context.
